title: resolve_client_id buf pattern should use Cow<str>
description: Why: resolve_client_id(id, buf) requires callers to pre-allocate a String on the stack so the fn can write into it and return a borrow. Cow<'a, str> exists for exactly this — Borrowed when id is Some, Owned when a ULID is generated. The current pattern is surprising and error-prone (callers must remember to keep buf in scope). What: Change return type to Cow<'a, str>. This is pub(super) so no public API breakage.
